data.title: Paysafe to Release Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Results on August 13, 2026
data.description: Paysafe Limited, a global payments platform traded on the NYSE under the ticker symbol PSFE, is set to release its financial results for the second quarter of 2026 on Thursday, August 13, 2026, prior to the market opening. A live webcast discussing the results will be hosted by management at 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day. For those interested, the webcast and additional information can be found on the investor relations page of the Paysafe website at ir.paysafe.com. Following the event, an archive of the webcast will be accessible and available for viewing.

data.title: PropertyRadar Powers Multi-Channel Marketing Across 160 Million Properties Using Nylas Email API
data.description: In San Francisco, Nylas, a communications data layer for modern software, shared a case study about PropertyRadar leveraging the Nylas Email API to establish the email infrastructure for its multi-channel marketing system. PropertyRadar, a property intelligence and outreach tool for real estate professionals, including investors, agents, brokers, and marketing agencies, uses this platform to connect with property owners nationwide. PropertyRadar's network reaches over 160 million individuals in the United States, facilitating interactions to facilitate deals.

data.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific Launches Thermo Scientific™ InstaFlux™ to Help Food Microbiology Labs Simplify Workflows in Pathogen and Environmental Testing
data.description: Thermo Fisher Scientific has unveiled its latest offering, Thermo Scientific™ InstaFlux™, to aid food microbiology labs worldwide. This integrated media-on-demand enrichment workflow aims to streamline media preparation, boost productivity, and elevate sample traceability. The launch comes as food testing labs encounter mounting challenges of escalating sample volumes, quick turnaround demands, and quality control amidst workforce limitations and sustainability targets. With Thermo Scientific™ InstaFlux™, labs can anticipate increased efficiency and operational ease in meeting these demands.

data.title: Teranet Announces Upcoming CEO Retirement
data.description: A prominent Canadian company, Teranet Inc., declared that Elgin Farewell, its President and Chief Executive Officer, will be retiring after a notable tenure spanning nearly 30 years, with over 13 years serving as the President and CEO. Farewell will remain in his current positions during the transition phase as the company's Board finalizes the succession process for the new CEO. Teranet is recognized for providing statutory registry services, technology platforms, and property intelligence solutions in Canada.

data.title: India demands GitHub to remove 3 of Jack Dorsey's Bitchat repositories within 3 hours, citing app's role in protests.
data.description: GitHub was recently instructed to remove three code repositories within a strict three-hour deadline. The request was made due to concerns regarding the messaging app's utilization during internet shutdowns that occur during protests.

data.title: Powers of Reasoning Named Ad Age Media Agency of the Year
data.description: In New York, Powers of Reasoning was named Media Agency of the Year and awarded Campaign of the Year for their work on the DUDE Wipes' "The Big Dump" at the 2026 Small Agency Awards by Ad Age. This recognition underscores the agency's excellence in media strategy.

data.title: Mineros S.A. Q2 2026 Results Conference Call to Be Held August 6, 2026
data.description: A conference call will be held by Mineros S.A. (TSX: MSA | OTCQX: MNSAF | BVC: MINEROS) on Thursday, August 6, 2026, at 8:00 AM Colombian Standard Time (9:00 AM Eastern Daylight Time). Registration is necessary to participate in the live webcast, with interested parties advised to sign up in advance. Access to the webcast should be made around ten minutes before the scheduled call time. The webcast will be available for later viewing on the Company’s website at www.
